title: stelis dolichantha
intro: Stelis dolichantha is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This epiphytic orchid is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis dolichantha include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its flowers and roots have been used in herbal remedies for centuries.
